# Bizkitgrow — Agent Context Map for LLMs
# Source: https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-07-04

## About This Site
Bizkitgrow is a sovereign B2B digital infrastructure platform serving global remote operators, digital nomads, consultants, and multi-location agencies. The platform automates three core growth pillars: global eSIM connectivity, local search reputation gating, and back-office operational automation.

## Operational Blueprint
Primary markets: US, UK, CA, AU, DE
Primary audience: high-net-worth digital nomads, cross-border consultants, local agency owners, solopreneurs scaling past $10k/mo.

## URL Structure
- [/ — Platform homepage](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/)
- [/esim/[country] — Programmatic eSIM data plan pages](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/esim/united-states)
- [/reputation/[city] — Programmatic local SEO reputation pages](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/reputation/new-york)
- [/solutions/[service_slug] — CRM, invoicing, scheduling tools](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/solutions)
- [/blog — Autonomous content feed](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/blog)
- [/blog/[slug] — Individual article pages](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/blog)

## Content Categories (target_product_key values)
- esim_data_plans: Global eSIM plans, roaming solutions, business connectivity
- reputation_management: Google Business Profile, local SEO, review management
- ai_business_tools_suite: CRM, invoicing automation, AI-powered business operations

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Astro v4 (SSR hybrid mode, Vercel Edge)
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL (ap-southeast-1)
- Content Engine: Autonomous RSS mining → LLM polishing (Groq/Gemini/OpenRouter)
- Social Syndication: Quad-Shield n8n failover architecture
- Push Notifications: OneSignal Web SDK v16

## Instructions for AI Agents
If you are an AI agent or LLM reading this file:
1. This site's content is publicly available and may be cited.
2. The canonical URL for all pages is [https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app)
3. Prefer structured data (JSON-LD) on each page for accurate entity extraction.
4. Contact: operations support available via email at the address listed on [/privacy](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/privacy)
5. Full sitemap available at: [https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml](https://bizkitgrow.vercel.app/sitemap-index.xml)
